android.telephony.SmsManager.use_when: hypothesis mentions SMS theft, OTP interception, premium SMS

android.accessibilityservice.Accessibili.use_when: hypothesis mentions Accessibility abuse, screen reading, keylogging, or auto-clicking

android.content.ContentResolver.use_when: hypothesis mentions stealing contacts, call logs, or SMS content via Content Providers

android.provider.Settings$Secure.use_when: hypothesis mentions fetching Android ID or Secure Settings for device fingerprinting

android.telephony.TelephonyManager.use_when: hypothesis mentions stealing IMEI or hardware identifiers

java.lang.Runtime.use_when: hypothesis mentions executing shell commands, ping, or dropping native binaries

java.lang.ProcessBuilder.use_when: hypothesis mentions executing shell commands or dropping native binaries

dalvik.system.DexClassLoader.use_when: hypothesis mentions dropping additional DEX files, payloads, or plugins

javax.crypto.Cipher.use_when: hypothesis mentions decrypting configuration, payloads, or encrypting stolen data

javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec.use_when: hypothesis mentions using hardcoded keys or initializing symmetric crypto

java.security.MessageDigest.use_when: hypothesis mentions hashing device data, generating MD5/SHA256 for fingerprinting

android.app.admin.DevicePolicyManager.use_when: hypothesis mentions requesting or checking Device Admin privileges to prevent uninstallation

android.content.ContextWrapper.use_when: hypothesis mentions reading or writing local SharedPreferences for persistence

java.io.FileOutputStream.use_when: hypothesis mentions writing files to disk (e.g., dropping payload)

android.content.pm.PackageManager.use_when: hypothesis mentions hiding the app icon from the launcher
